LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, TURK STREET INC. AND DALT HOTEL, L.P'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT REQUIRING PLAINTIFF UNDERGO INDEPENDENT MEDICAL (PHYSICAL AND MENTAL) EXAMINATIONS PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 2032.220, 2032.320 - WHILE THE COURT IS INCLINED TO PERMIT A MEDICAL EXAMINATION, TO AVOID POSSIBLE PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF OR A DELAY IN THE TRIAL, THAT EXAMINATION SHOULD OCCUR, IF AT ALL POSSIBLE, BY MAY 12, 2017. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT FIGURE OUT BY GETTING THE MEDICAL EXAMINATION EARLIER THAN MAY 30 AND IS STILL A LIVE ISSUE AS OF MAY 23 AND THE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED, THE PARTIES CAN FILE AN EX-PARTE APPLICATION BEFORE DEPT. 302. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =(302/HK)

DEFENDANTS TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, TURK STREET INC. and DALT HOTEL, L.P's Motion For Leave Of Court Requiring Plaintiff Undergo Independent Medical (Physical And Mental) Examinations Pursuant To C.C.P. 2032.220, 2032.320 - While the court is inclined to permit a medical examination, to avoid possible prejudice to plaintiff or a delay in the trial, that examination should occur, if at all possible, by May 12, 2107.
